checks.name: npm run lint
checks.details: ESLint exited 0 with 7 pre-existing unused-variable warnings in unrelated files and no errors.

checks.name: npm run build
checks.details: Next.js 16.0.10 production build compiled, typechecked, and generated static pages successfully. The printed route table contains /, /music-fonts, /songs, /songs/[songId], and /voicings, with no /quiz or /chords route.

checks.name: Runtime source references
checks.details: Targeted source searches found no navigation links to /quiz or /chords, no removed page.tsx files, and no IntervalQuiz or PlayButton runtime references.

checks.name: React best-practices review
checks.details: The remaining TSX edit only removes two static navigation entries and introduces no component, hook, accessibility, performance, or TypeScript regression.

visual_checks.name: Before primary navigation evidence
visual_checks.details: Before screenshot .ai/runs/2026-07-23T16-47-54.798Z_remove-quiz-chords-pages/evidence/before-home.png and browser snapshot showed Canvas, Chords, Voicings, Quiz, Songs, and Score Lab.

visual_checks.name: After desktop primary navigation
visual_checks.details: After screenshot .ai/runs/2026-07-23T16-47-54.798Z_remove-quiz-chords-pages/evidence/after-home-desktop.png and browser snapshot showed exactly Canvas, Voicings, Songs, and Score Lab. The page had meaningful content, no framework error overlay, and document scrollWidth equaled clientWidth at 1280px.

visual_checks.name: After mobile primary navigation
visual_checks.details: After screenshot .ai/runs/2026-07-23T16-47-54.798Z_remove-quiz-chords-pages/evidence/after-home-mobile.png showed the same four remaining links at 390px. document scrollWidth equaled clientWidth, so the reduced navigation introduced no avoidable horizontal overflow.

visual_checks.name: Removed route behavior
visual_checks.details: Browser checks and direct HTTP requests confirmed /quiz and /chords each return the normal 404 page with no framework error overlay.

visual_checks.name: Representative navigation and redundant-label check
visual_checks.details: The shared navigation retains the four supported destinations in their prior relative order, with no replacement label, duplicate local context, or stale removed-route entry.

visual_checks.name: Served CSS semantic class check
visual_checks.details: No CSS rules, reusable semantic classes, styling tokens, or theme infrastructure changed.
